utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: (1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance and provides a combined cost; includes plan names and monthly costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with a plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: specifies a travel insurance plan with monthly cost—fully specified. (4) additional_services: lists services each with a cost—fully specified. (5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home/contents, InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel, plus additional services Telemedicine Services, Home Security System Discount, and Premium Insurance Membership. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 8), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health rating 6), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home_content rating 7), InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel_insurance rating 7), Telemedicine Services (health_enhancement_services rating 9), Home Security System Discount (property_enhancement_services rating 9), and Premium Insurance Membership (general_services rating 10).
